mapper.select: SELECT banner_id, title, image_url, promo_type AS subtitle, '#' AS link_url, banner_id AS priority FROM PROMOTION_BANNER WHERE active_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY banner_id ASC

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT RT.room_type_id, RT.fk_hotel_id AS brand_id, RT.room_grade, RT.room_name, RT.view_type, RI.image_url -- room_image 테이블에서 가져온 이미지 경로 FROM ROOM_TYPE RT JOIN room_image RI ON RT.room_type_id = RI.room_type_id WHERE RT.is_active = 'Y' AND RI.is_main = 'Y' ORDER BY DBMS_RANDOM.VALUE ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 2

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT DINING_ID, FK_HOTEL_ID, NAME, MAIN_IMG FROM tbl_dining -- 만약 활성화 여부 컬럼이 없다면 이 WHERE절은 삭제하거나 컬럼명에 맞게 수정하세요. -- WHERE ACTIVE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY DBMS_RANDOM.VALUE -- 랜덤으로 3개 추출 ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 3
SELECT promotion_id, title, promotion_type AS subtitle, 'default_poster.jpg' AS poster_img, promotion_type AS tags FROM PROMOTION_MASTER WHERE is_active = 1 ORDER BY promotion_id DESC
